## Proceed with AX Device Deadline Sprint

Use this public issue fallback only for non-confidential intent. Do not include confidential customer data, private personal data, payment credentials, trade secrets, passwords, private tokens, or sensitive internal materials.

## Public metadata only

- Company or organization:
- Your role:

## Scope acknowledgement

- Fee: KRW 8,000,000
- Timeline: 10 business days after payment confirmation and kickoff inputs
- No work starts before payment is confirmed
- No guarantee of grant, voucher, procurement, pilot, funding, contract, sale, selection, revenue, or approval
- Human review is required before any final submission

## Private next step

For invoice, payment route, kickoff materials, and sensitive details, use a verified private route instead of this public issue.
